creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
Files in pkg/ are missing, so port will not install.

Fix: 

Restore pkg/ files, or remove port.
How-To-Repeat: 
difficult way:

Become a U.S. and/or Canadian citizen.  Sync up your CVS repository with
cvsup6.freebsd.org.  Check out the netscape47-navigator.us port.  Download 
navigator-v472-us.x86-unknown-freebsd.tar.gz to /usr/ports/distfiles/.  Do
"make install" in /usr/ports/www/netscape47-navigator.us/.

easy way:

Browse on over to
http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/www/netscape47-navigator.us/pkg/?cvsroot=freebsd
and note that the files are marked as "in the Attic".  Browse
http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/www/netscape47-navigator.us/?cvsroot=freebsd
and find no such markings.
